name: Security State Bank Of Kenyon
description_short: Community bank in Kenyon, Minnesota offering checking, savings, mortgages, business loans, and agricultural lending with personalized service.
description_long:
Security State Bank of Kenyon is a traditional community bank headquartered in Kenyon, Minnesota. The bank has been serving the local area and emphasizes personal relationships and understanding individual customer needs over purely transactional banking.

The bank offers a full suite of retail and commercial banking services including checking and savings accounts, IRAs, home equity lines of credit (currently promoted with no closing costs), consumer loans, agricultural loans, business loans, and mortgage lending. They provide online banking, debit cards, and standard bank account services. The bank also partners with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines and has demonstrated community involvement through charitable giving.

Security State Bank of Kenyon distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized service and local decision-making. Their marketing explicitly positions themselves as a "people business" rather than purely numbers-driven, and they highlight their willingness to be "flexible and creative" in meeting individual borrowing needs across agricultural, commercial, consumer, and real estate segments.

As a small community bank, Security State Bank of Kenyon is best suited for customers in the Kenyon, Minnesota area seeking relationship-based banking and local loan decisions. The bank appears to have limited digital capabilities compared to larger institutions or neobanks, and loan products and rates are not transparently disclosed online—customers must contact loan officers directly for specifics.
pros: No closing cost home equity lines of credit (as of website publication)
Full-service lender across consumer, agricultural, business, and mortgage segments
Personalized service model with loan officers available for individual consultation
Online banking portal for account access and management
Partnership with Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines providing additional resources
Community involvement with documented charitable contributions ($20,000+ grants)
After-hours debit card support (1-800-472-3272) for lost/stolen cards
cons: Limited geographic footprint—no indication of branches beyond Kenyon, Minnesota area
No transparent rate or term information online; requires direct contact with loan officers
Website lacks details on account fees, minimum balances, or specific product terms
No mention of mobile app or advanced digital banking features
Limited product descriptions make it difficult to compare offerings to competitors online
best_for: Kenyon, Minnesota area residents seeking local, relationship-based banking
Agricultural borrowers needing flexible farm lending from local decision-makers
Small business owners requiring personalized commercial loan service
Customers prioritizing personal banker relationships over digital-first banking
diagnosis: Security State Bank of Kenyon is appropriate for customers in the Kenyon, Minnesota area seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and local loan decisions. The main caveat is the lack of online transparency about rates, fees, and terms—customers must contact the bank directly, and the limited digital infrastructure suggests this is a small regional institution, not a competitive option for customers seeking modern or comprehensive online banking features.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
